entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphic loci used as genetic markers for mapping

entities.description: Genome Association and Prediction Integrated Tool R package used to identify chromosomal locations

entities.name: GWAS

entities.description: The published reference genome of sorghum used for mapping SNPs
